summary_en: Takada Corporation completed repurchase of 14,200 shares (0.19% of outstanding) for ¥23.4M via TSE market purchase between 5–19 May 2026.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Status of Treasury Shares and Completion of Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Takada Corporation filed notice on 20 May 2026 confirming completion of its treasury share acquisition program. The company repurchased 14,200 ordinary shares at a total cost of ¥23,350,900 via market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between 14–19 May 2026, representing 0.19% of outstanding shares (excluding treasury stock). The acquisition was executed under the Board resolution of 13 May 2026, which had authorized acquisition of up to 14,200 shares with a ceiling price of ¥29.1M over the period 14 May through 30 June 2026. The actual acquisition consumed approximately ¥23.35M of the authorized budget and was completed within the scheduled timeframe. No stated rationale beyond standard capital management is disclosed.
